description: Full batch test specification for ANSWER mode with exhaustive option matrix (900 test scenarios)

testCases.originalText: Just shipped a new feature that lets users export their data in real-time. Took 3 months but finally done!
Most startups fail because they build what they want, not what customers need. Stop guessing and start talking to users.
Officially at 10K MRR today. Started from $0 revenue 14 months ago. Grateful for every customer who believed in us.
AI is great but we're using it as a band-aid for bad UX. If your product needs AI to be usable, you have a design problem.
We're hiring a senior backend engineer! Fully remote, competitive salary, and you'll be working on infrastructure that handles 50M+ requests per day.
My code before coffee: syntax errors everywhere. My code after coffee: logic errors everywhere. Progress.
Shoutout to everyone who shares their startup journey publicly. Your transparency helps more people than you realize.
Acabamos de lanzar soporte multiidioma en nuestra app. Fue más complicado de lo que pensábamos pero valió la pena.
El marketing no es spam. Si tu mensaje no ayuda a tu audiencia, no es marketing, es ruido.
Hoy celebramos nuestro primer año como empresa. Han sido 365 días de aprendizaje intenso y crecimiento constante.
Trabajar remoto no significa estar disponible 24/7. Necesitamos normalizar los límites y el descanso.
Estamos buscando nuestro primer diseñador UI/UX. Si te apasiona crear experiencias simples y elegantes, hablemos.
Mi proceso de debugging: 1) No funciona. 2) No sé por qué. 3) Funciona. 4) No sé por qué.
Me encanta ver cómo la comunidad tech latina está creciendo. Cada día veo más proyectos increíbles saliendo de LATAM.
Wir haben gerade Dark Mode für unsere App ausgerollt. Die meistgewünschte Funktion unserer Community ist jetzt live!
Gute Kommunikation im Team ist wichtiger als alle Tools der Welt. Tools helfen nur, wenn die Basics stimmen.
Nach 8 Monaten Entwicklung haben wir heute unsere Beta gestartet. Nervös und aufgeregt gleichzeitig.
Produktivität bedeutet nicht, 12 Stunden zu arbeiten. Es bedeutet, in weniger Zeit mehr zu erreichen.
Ich: "Das Feature ist in 2 Stunden fertig." Mein Code: "Lass mich dir eine Geschichte über Edge Cases erzählen."
Respekt an alle, die nebenbei an ihren Projekten arbeiten. Es ist nicht einfach, aber euer Durchhaltevermögen ist inspirierend.

executionPlan.calculation: 5 reply styles × 3 stances × 3 lengths = 45 combinations per test case
executionPlan.description: Each test case will be processed with all 45 option combinations to generate replies

rules: Respond in the same language as the original text (EN/ES/DE)
Do NOT invent facts, statistics, or details not present in the original
Respect the selected stance:
- Neutral = balanced, non-committal, observational
- Agree = supportive, aligned, reinforcing
- Disagree = respectful, constructive, non-inflammatory
Respect Reply Style:
- Helpful = informative, constructive, adds value
- Friendly = warm, conversational, personable
- Confident = assertive, clear, authoritative
- Witty = light humor, clever phrasing (never sarcastic or rude)
- Direct = concise, straight to the point, no fluff
Respect Length:
- Short = 1-2 sentences (suitable for quick reply)
- Medium = 2-4 sentences (balanced response)
- Long = 4-6 sentences (detailed engagement)
Never be rude, aggressive, or dismissive
Avoid emojis unless Reply Style = Friendly or Witty (then use sparingly)
Avoid hashtags unless they clearly fit the context
No markdown formatting in outputs
No code blocks or technical formatting
Output should be ready-to-post text
For Stance=Disagree: always remain respectful and constructive
For Stance=Agree: add your own perspective, don't just echo
For Stance=Neutral: provide balanced viewpoint or ask questions
Match the tone and formality of the original post
If original is casual, reply casually
If original is professional, reply professionally
When Reply Style=Witty: be clever, not mean
When Reply Style=Direct: be concise, not blunt
Quality check: reply must be coherent as a standalone response
Quality check: reply must add value to the conversation
Quality check: reply must respect community norms (Twitter/LinkedIn style)

expectedOutput.notes: Return the answer/reply only. No explanations, no quotes around the result, no commentary, no formatting. Just the raw reply text ready to be posted.

exampleCombinations.notes: Should produce a warm, supportive 1-2 sentence reply
Should produce a respectful but clear counterpoint in 2-4 sentences
Should provide balanced, informative response in 4-6 sentences
Should be clever and supportive in 1-2 sentences with light humor
Should be concise and to-the-point in 1-2 sentences

qualityChecks: Reply must be in the same language as original text
Reply must match the selected reply style
Reply must fall within the length constraints
Reply must be coherent and grammatically correct
Reply must not be offensive, rude, or inflammatory
Reply must add value to the conversation
Reply must work as a standalone response (no context needed beyond original post)
For Disagree stance: must remain respectful and constructive
For Witty style: humor must be appropriate and not mean-spirited
No code blocks or technical formatting
Emojis only if Reply Style = Friendly or Witty
notes: This specification is designed for exhaustive batch testing
Total of 900 test scenarios (20 test cases × 45 combinations)
All test cases use realistic, tweet-like content
Category distribution is balanced across tech, business, founder updates, opinions, news, humor, and community
Each combination should produce a unique, contextually appropriate reply
Test cases avoid extreme politics, hate speech, or unsafe content
All content is suitable for public social media platforms
This JSON serves as INPUT specification only - no generated answers included
